How's it going team? In this video we're going to do a brief overview of Facebook groups. Now you probably already know about Facebook groups. I just want to give you some information on how we use them. So Facebook groups are built into Facebook so anybody who has a Facebook account already has access to them. You're able to create and join groups for interests, hobbies, businesses, and more. And you can customize privacy settings so you can control who joins and what they post. Now as part of the uses that we have, you'll create support, hype, and camaraderie in your gym. You can create a gym wide group for your members and challenge specific groups to create micro communities in your gym. We're also able to use it as part of advertising and lead nurture so you can direct people right to a Google group as soon as they opt in. That way they're already building that connection and community with you. So follow some of the videos to get more information on Google groups. Facebook also has a ton of help on their pages as well. And our tech support team is always happy to answer any questions. Thanks for watching. I hope you have a great rest of your day.
